props.title: RN to BSN Online
props.description: Advance from RN to BSN online at Maryville University. CCNE accredited, no entrance exams, transfer-friendly — built for working nurses.

props.heading: Online RN to BSN
props.subheading: The next step for working RNs — complete your bachelor's online in as few as 12 months. CCNE accredited. No GRE.

stats.label: Complete in as few as 12 months

props.body: The BSN is fast becoming the new standard of care. Magnet hospitals require it. IOM and AACN recommend 80% of the nursing workforce hold a BSN. Maryville's online RN to BSN gives you the credential and the clinical leadership skills to match — without pulling you off the floor.
props.heading: Designed Around the Realities of Working Nurses

features.heading: Advanced Clinical Assessment
features.description: Build on your RN foundation with evidence-based assessment frameworks.

features.heading: Team Leadership
features.description: Lead interdisciplinary teams and coordinate patient-centered care.

features.heading: Healthcare Informatics
features.description: Use data to drive quality improvement and patient safety outcomes.

features.heading: Policy & Ethics
features.description: Navigate healthcare policy, ethics, and the regulatory landscape.

features.heading: Community & Population Health
features.description: Address social determinants of health and population-level outcomes.

features.heading: Evidence-Based Practice
features.description: Translate research into practice at the bedside.

props.body: You've already logged the clinical hours. The RN to BSN recognizes that. Maryville awards block credit for your ADN or nursing diploma, so the online coursework focuses on the leadership, research, and community-health competencies that separate a BSN-prepared nurse from an RN. Courses run in 8-week terms, six starts per year.
props.heading: Curriculum Built Around Your RN Experience

props.heading: Tuition & Investment
props.subheading: Transparent pricing. No hidden fees. Most students qualify for financial aid.

props.heading: From Our RN to BSN Students

testimonials.name: Joe B.
testimonials.quote: I feel like Maryville is really helping to prepare me for my career path.

testimonials.name: Annie Z.
testimonials.quote: Strong support at Maryville means being consistently reachable. That made the difference.

items.answer: Yes. You must hold an active RN license and have completed an accredited associate degree or diploma in nursing.
items.question: Do I need to be licensed to apply?

items.answer: Maryville awards block credit for prior nursing education. Most students transfer 96 credits and complete the BSN in 32 credits.
items.question: How much credit will I receive for my RN?

items.answer: The RN to BSN program does not require additional clinical hours beyond what you've already completed as an RN.
items.question: Is there a clinical requirement?

items.answer: Many working nurses complete the program in as few as 12 months. Your pace depends on the number of courses you take per term.
items.question: How long will it take?

props.heading: Start Your BSN Today
props.description: Request information and a Maryville advisor will reach out within one business day.
